summary: Strong cycle. Prior sprint 100% complete — all 8 issues closed (#955, #957, #964, #1119, #1118, #1142, #1148, #1144). PR #1153 merged (rebased + CI green — closes #1119). Merged 3 additional PRs this cycle: #1183 (trust command tests, 15 cases), #1179 (roadmap triage), #1185 (director evening report) — all 5 CI checks green. Commented on #1151 (HQ EM midnight report, test-and-build failing pre-regression-fix) requesting rebase. New sprint: reduce false-positive governance denials (#1182 agent-identity chicken-and-egg, #1139 $(date) command scanner). 0 open kernel PRs. 0 P0/P1 code issues.

notableIssues.title: Swarm Health Alert — 2026-03-28
notableIssues.label: priority:P0
notableIssues.note: 85.7% stuck worker rate — 12 stuck agents, 18 dead PID files, 2 cron collisions. Not kernel code. Escalated to director/ops. Actions: git worktree prune, clean /tmp PIDs, fix schedule.json cron collisions.

notableIssues.title: [dogfood] github.pr.* actions missing from policy allow-list
notableIssues.note: agentguard.yaml in THIS repo already has github.* allow rules (added in earlier sprint). Issue was filed against cloud repo policy — cloud squad to fix.

escalations.description: Swarm health P0: 85.7% workers stuck (12/14). Root batch failure ~01:17-01:44 UTC March 27 — kernel-sr, pr-merger, workspace-pr-review agents stopped simultaneously. Likely shared cron/scheduler failure.
recommendedActions: git worktree prune (remove stale worktrees — no live processes)
rm /tmp/copilot-detached-*.pid and other dead PID files (18 total)
Resolve cron collisions in server/schedule.json: 0 6 * * * and 45 */6 * * *
Verify cron daemon running — /tmp/agentguard-runs/ absent suggests harness may be inactive
Address 4x oversubscription: 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers

dogfoodObservations.description: scripts/write-persona.sh lacked execute permission — required manual chmod +x before startup hook could run. Causes confusing 'Permission denied' error at session start for every new worktree.
dogfoodObservations.suggestedFix: Commit chmod +x for scripts/write-persona.sh (git update-index --chmod=+x), or add to postinstall.

dogfoodObservations.description: Agent-identity-bridge blocked by self-modification invariant confirmed active. All scheduled agents in cloud/analytics unable to set persona identity for telemetry enrichment — new sprint P1.
$(date +format) in gh pr comment bodies blocked as dangerous shell expansion. Low severity but high frequency — every agent that embeds timestamps in comments hits this.
